title: Fast Eleven lead in regional league
description: SOCCER NEWS - The top-of-the-log Fast Eleven...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Zama Gagu","contributorName":"Zama Gagu","contributorDate":"Thursday, 29 January 2026, 12:13"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SOCCER NEWS - The top-of-the-log Fast Eleven had mixed results in their Safa Eden Regional League fixtures last weekend.","html":"SOCCER NEWS - The top-of-the-log Fast Eleven had mixed results in their Safa Eden Regional League fixtures last weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Saturday 24 January, they defeated Smuts United 6-4 at the Smutsville sports field in Sedgefield, but went down 3-0 against the spirited FC Rebels at Hornlee Stadium in Knysna in their second game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 18 points, Fast Eleven are currently occupying the top spot on the log table. They have played eight games with six victories, lost in two outings, scored 20 goals and conceded 15 goals.","html":"With 18 points, Fast Eleven are currently occupying the top spot on the log table. They have played eight games with six victories, lost in two outings, scored 20 goals and conceded 15 goals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season.","html":"The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said they have learnt from their mistakes in their less successful first season in this league.","html":"He said they have learnt from their mistakes in their less successful first season in this league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to a good relationship and understanding between the players and management, the team is at the summit and stands a good chance of putting George on the map again.","html":"Thanks to a good relationship and understanding between the players and management, the team is at the summit and stands a good chance of putting George on the map again."}]

They have played eight games with six victories, lost in two outings, scored 20 goals and conceded 15 goals.","html":"With 18 points, Fast Eleven are currently occupying the top spot on the log table. They have played eight games with six victories, lost in two outings, scored 20 goals and conceded 15 goals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season.","html":"The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said they have learnt from their mistakes in their less successful first season in this league.","html":"He said they have learnt from their mistakes in their less successful first season in this league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to a good relationship and understanding between the players and management, the team is at the summit and stands a good chance of putting George on the map again.","html":"Thanks to a good relationship and understanding between the players and management, the team is at the summit and stands a good chance of putting George on the map again."}]

images.alt: Fast Eleven lead in regional league

author: Zama Gagu
teaser: The Fast Eleven skipper, Sihle Mafukula, thanked their coaches, Odwa Gayi and Nkosivile Jubeju, for leading them on their victorious path this season.
featuredCaption: Fast Eleven FC is currently in the lead in the Safa Eden Regional Men’s League. Photo: Zama Gagu
